title: code.implement output
description: The real output is the uncommitted working-tree diff; the user reviews it via the PWA git view. This schema covers the summary message returned by the session.

summary.description: One-paragraph human summary: what changed, any deviations, anything to look for in review.

deviations.description: Specific places the implementer diverged from the approach (e.g., file moved, API renamed).
